description.tr: Pickup across the UK; packing, insurance and customs coordination through door delivery in Turkey.

keyword.tr: uk to turkey household removal, ToR1 move turkey, post brexit relocation
keyword.en: uk to turkey household removal, ToR1 move turkey, post brexit relocation

text.tr:
Brand and SEO separation: This page targets the United Kingdom to Turkey (UK→TR) lane. For Turkey-origin shipping to Europe/UK, use Han Bros Cargo on hanbroscargo.com; each domain uses distinct keywords and corridor messaging.

Process outline

  1. Survey and volume estimate
  2. Document pack
  3. UK loading and export formalities
  4. Sea/road main carriage
  5. TR import and door delivery
